single_next_goal: Correct Agent Terminal dock terminal session cwd/root reporting so the endpoint references the actual PTY substrate rather than inferring a dock cwd that may differ from the running session.

review_finding.summary: The /dock-terminal-session endpoint passes cwd undefined unless a cwd query or SIGIL_AGENT_DOCK_CWD is supplied. The registry then defaults to repoRoot/.docks/<dock>, which can differ from the active PTY cwd from SIGIL_AGENT_CWD/sessionCommands. The endpoint can therefore report a dock session cwd that is not the actual terminal substrate cwd.

clipboard_prompt: follow the transfer packet in .docks/foreman/packets/to-gdi-dock-terminal-session-cwd-correction-v0.json; start from gdi/dock-terminal-session-registry-v0 at b5341c34f9dcb7f43fe91ae717e0f8257b1e3fef
required_evidence: Agent Terminal /dock-terminal-session reports the active session cwd from terminalCwdForSession(session) unless an explicit dock cwd override is intentionally supplied
The endpoint no longer claims .docks/<dock> when the running PTY/default session cwd is different
Agent Terminal launch path passes a stable repo root to server.mjs for both tmux and non-tmux startup paths, or an equivalent test-backed root derivation is implemented
Tests cover actual-cwd reporting and explicit dock-cwd override behavior
Existing dock terminal session schema/helper tests and AFK warm reuse receipt tests still pass
Statement that no live provider launch, real terminal drive, transcript body read, provider mutation, GitHub mutation, async routing, or unsupervised trigger behavior occurred

implementation requires gateway/broker, Slack, GitHub, Foreman inbox, notifier route mutation, async result routing, or removing --i-am-present
